description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named uncompyle6 for macOS that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job on macOS-latest to test uncompyle6 with Python 3.6, 3.7, and 3.8. The job should check out the repository, set up the Python version, install dependencies including xdis from a Git repository, install the package and development requirements, and run make check to test uncompyle6.
